scripts.install: node -e "if (process.platform !== 'win32') process.exit(0); const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const result = spawnSync('node-gyp', ['rebuild', '--clang=0', '--msvs_version=2022'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.rebuild: node -e "if (process.platform !== 'win32') process.exit(0); const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const result = spawnSync('node-gyp', ['rebuild', '--clang=0', '--msvs_version=2022'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
